description: VERIFIED LIVE: Slack via your logged-in app.slack.com web session (session bridge — no bot token to paste). Reads your identity, profile, channels, workspace members and unread counts using the xoxc token your Slack web app already holds (read from localConfig_v2) plus the session 'd' cookie. Tested live by Claude Code against a logged-in workspace: auth.test, users.profile.get, conversations.list, users.list and client.counts all returned ok:true with real data. Targets your first signed-in workspace.

tools.name: slack_auth_test
tools.description: Your Slack identity for the current workspace (team, user, url). VERIFIED.

tools.name: slack_profile
tools.description: Your Slack profile (real name, title, status, email). VERIFIED.

tools.name: slack_conversations
tools.description: List channels/conversations in the workspace. VERIFIED.

tools.name: slack_users
tools.description: List members of the workspace. VERIFIED.

tools.name: slack_counts
tools.description: Your unread/mention counts across channels and threads. VERIFIED.
